A .zip containing the app folder (manifest.json + app.py, or data.json for a channel app). Functional apps run Python on this host — only upload apps you trust.
Also uses global settings: %s — set these under Global settings.
Apps watch for events and briefly interrupt the display when something happens.
Default timezone for clocks and time-based apps.
Delete "%s"? This removes the uploaded app for good.
Edit shared settings apps rely on (API keys, location, timezone…)
Geocoded to place you — used unless a precise location is set below.
Home every module — returns the whole display to its blank home position and stops anything playing
How long each app page shows before advancing, unless an app overrides it.
Key generated and stored with your settings. Pin your own with COMPANION_VESTABOARD_KEY.
Live — frames are sent to the display. Turn on to test apps without touching the wall.
Manually sync this companion's settings with the gateway (needs Gateway 3.1+).
Multilingual — adapts to the global Language
No global settings yet — install apps that use shared settings (weather, stocks, …).
Off. Turn on to accept Vestaboard Local API calls (Home Assistant, scripts) at /local-api/message — this display then answers like a Vestaboard.
Off. Turn on to let an LLM client (Claude, an agent) drive the display as tools at /mcp — show a message, run an app, read the board.
Open-Meteo is keyless; the others use the Weather API key below.
Override the global Language for this app only.
Override the global Location for this app only (place search).
Pull grid geometry + MQTT settings from the gateway now.
Remove all per-entry overrides (follow the app's settings)
Required for OpenWeather, WeatherAPI.com and QWeather; Open-Meteo needs none.
Search a place for exact coordinates; overrides the ZIP/city above.
Sequence apps and composed messages, each shown for its own duration.
Set a polling rate to estimate API usage.
Shared by the YouTube subscriber, comments and livestream apps.
Show up/down and status as text only, without the colored tiles.
Simulating — nothing is sent to the physical display (the live preview still updates).

The display language for apps that support it (look for the 🌐 badge): it translates their words and sets date order, number format and 12h/24h. Currency and holidays follow your Location, not this. Any app can override it in its own settings. Only Windows-1252 (Western-European) languages are listed — the modules can't show others.
These apply to this playlist entry only. Unchanged fields follow the app's own settings.
This returns the whole display to its blank home position and stops anything currently playing.
Token generated and stored with your settings. Pin your own with COMPANION_MCP_TOKEN.
Used by this app (auto-detected — not in the app's manifest)
click a cell to type · arrows to move · a swatch paints the cell
